name: Knowit AB (publ)
summary: Knowit AB (publ), a consultancy company, provides digital and cross-functional solutions in the Nordic region. The company operates in three segments: Experience, Insight, and Solutions. It offers services in the areas of strategy and digitalization, analysis and insight, branding and communication, design and innovation, digital marketing, Web development and platforms, E-commerce and PIM, mobile solutions, architecture, big data, business intelligence, cloud, defense solutions, digital transformation, finance technology, Internet of Things, machine learning and artificial intelligence, mobility, robotics, quality assurance, sourcing management, SysDevops, and technical transformation. The company also provides services in the areas of digital law, energy management, human resource management, IT strategy, organization development, project management, quality management, scaled agile and lean, and security. It serves banking and finance, insurance, energy, manufacturing, life science and medical, media, education, gaming, public, retail, services, and telecom sectors. The company was formerly known as Know IT AB (publ.) and changed its name to Knowit AB (publ) in April 2012. Knowit AB (publ) was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
